title: The man from the shadow (horror)
description: Fight the nightmares from the past.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/j5E-u4A8yvs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Big update coming soon...
RECOMMENDED PLAYING IN SINGLEPLAYER
GECKOLIB REQUIERED
THE MAN FROM THE SHADOW
A psychological horror mod that preys on your mind. You are trapped in a nightmare with a relentless, perverted entity from your past. Your only solace is a bottle of pills, but every dose makes the shadow more real.

Watch your sanity
His activities depends on your sanity level. Take your pills and you will be just fine, unless you get overdosed. To control your sanity i added dandelion in the corner of the screen that represents level of your sanity. 

If you encounter shadow figure
Try not to make any contact and do not approach him. Taking pills will make him dissapear for a while. Remember that. As doctor said he's not real.

What if you loose your sanity?
If that happens, things will get worse. Visions will appear more and more until Man gets physical form and tries to bring you to the "paradise", and this time you won't escape him.

KEEP FIGHTING
Find out about your past and all of the tortures he did to you. Be strong. Be bold. Don't let him toy with you. 
About the next update:
I'll rework some of the mechanics and will add more interactions. Also full story mode will be added. Will you able to defeat your fears? Only you decide that.
